No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives do not directly or indirectly address poverty eradication or related economic support.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content focuses on language and culture, with no connection to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to health services, disease prevention, mental well-being, or safety.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), develops language skills (4.4), and fosters appreciation for Korean culture and current events (4.7), directly contributing to quality learning outcomes and cultural diversity.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no mention of water resources, sanitation, hygiene, or pollution in the course description or learning outcomes.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not relate to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency in any capacity.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not involve marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable use of marine resources.
